events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: trench protection, no ladder within 25 ft lateral travel. OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires ladder access within 25 ft of lateral travel for trenches 4 feet or more deep. This is non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high/critical. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions non-compliant.

  "rationale": "OSHA 1926 Subpart P requires a safe means of egress (ladder, ramp, or stairway) within 25 ft of lateral travel for trench excavations 4 ft or deeper. The observed condition lacks ladder access within that distance, creating an immediate life-safety hazard.",
